nasb.text: Though the pride of Israel testifies against him, Yet they have not returned to the Lord their God, Nor have they sought Him, for all this.

esv.text: The pride of Israel testifies to his face; yet they do not return to the Lord their God, nor seek him, for all this.

cnv.text: 雖然以色列的驕傲當面指證自己， 他們卻不回轉歸向耶和華他們的　神， 也不因此尋求他。

ccb.text: 以色列人被自己的傲慢指控， 他们却不归向他们的上帝耶和华， 也不去寻求祂。
